title: Saro´s Book Renamer
description: Rename written books using a simple client-side command.
body:
![header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_BookRenamer_Mod/MP_SarosBookRenamerMod_header.webp)

A tiny Minecraft client-side mod allows you to rename written books directly via a simple in-game command. Perfect for players and mapmakers who want to adjust book metadata without re-writing the entire content.

![dis](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_BookRenamer_Mod/MP_SarosBookRenamerMod_description.webp)

* Rename the **title** and **author** of any **written book** you hold.
* Works fully **client-side**.
* Super lightweight and simple to use.

## ⚙ Usage

Hold a written book in your main hand and use the following command:

```
/bockrename <title> <author>
```

If you're not holding a written book, the mod will notify you to do that.

[![https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_BookRenamer_Mod/MP_SarosBookRenamerMod_promo.webp "https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php ")](https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php "https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php")


**Project Support & Usage**

**Hosting:** For the best performance, I recommend using BisectHosting linked in the banner.

**Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.
